sample_flagged.title: TGME Project - Long-Lead Processing Plant & Equipment
ii_key_points: Major procurement milestone achieved for the TGME Gold Project.
Orders placed with leading metallurgical engineering firms Kemix and MIP Industries.
Equipment includes agitators, electrowinning circuits, and thickeners.
Project remains on track for end-2026 commissioning.
The project is set to create over 500 jobs and support community programs.
Theta Gold Mines Limited is committed to regional economic development.

sample_flagged.title: Plant Build - Ball Mills Secured, Construction Accelerates
ii_key_points: Major equipment order placed with MechProTech for two Titan GDM3065 Ball Mills.
Dual mill configuration for operational flexibility and redundancy.
Manufacturing in South Africa, with proximity to the mine for support.
137-strong on-site team with ongoing civil works.
The plant commissioning targeted by the end of 2026.
Construction model designed to fast-track build speed and reduce costs.

sample_flagged.title: Quarterly Activities & Cashflow Report - 30 Sept'25
ii_key_points: Theta Gold Mines Limited (TGM) had cash and cash equivalents of US $3.4 million as of 30 September 2025.
The company's total consolidated cash flows from operating activities resulted in a net cash outflow of US $1,166,000 for the quarter.
Cash flows from investing activities also showed a net cash outflow of US $1,053,000.
TGM received proceeds from borrowings totaling US $45,000 and repaid US $19,000 in borrowings.
The company did not receive any proceeds from equity securities or convertible debt issues during the quarter.
Payments to related parties amounting to US $111,000 were recorded, primarily for directors' fees and consulting fees.
The estimated market capitalization of TGM was A$244 million (US$161 million) as of 30 September 2025.
TGM announced a Share Purchase Plan (SPP) aimed at raising up to A$2 million to eligible shareholders.
The company secured a 13-year renewal of Mining Right 83, critical for project financing, covering key mines contributing to over 75% of the Feasibility Study schedule.

sample_flagged.title: Quarterly Activities & Cashflow Report - 31 Dec'25
ii_key_points: Theta Gold Mines Limited (TGM) is advancing its TGME Gold Project in South Africa with significant construction progress.
The company secured A$60.71 million in funding for the project, composed of equity and debt.
The project is on schedule with the gold plant build expected to be commissioned by the end of Q4 2026.
TGM has reached a non-binding funding agreement for US$80 million with Nebari Partners LLC.
Over 70% of non-specialist personnel for the project are sourced from local communities, with over 500 jobs expected at full production.
TGM reported a cash position of US$12.5 million as of 31 December 2025.
The estimated market capitalization of TGM was A$183 million as of 31 December 2025.

sample_flagged.title: Revised Feasibility Study Confirms A$1.4B Free Cash Flow
ii_key_points: Revised Feasibility Study confirms A$1.4 billion free cash flow.
13.1-year Life of Mine with high-margin operations.
Post-tax NPV10% of A$689 million, IRR of 77%.
Projected average gold price of US$2,884/oz.
1.01 million ounces of gold production targeted.
Significant leverage to gold price movements.
Initial phase involves production from four historic mines.
Further upside potential from additional mines in the region.

sample_flagged.title: TGME Plant Build Progress - Earthworks & Civils on Track
ii_key_points: TGME Gold Project's bulk earthworks and civil works are progressing as planned.
Theta Gold Mines plans to commission the TGME Gold Plant by the end of 2026.
The project is located near Pilgrim's Rest, Mpumalanga Province, South Africa.
Theta Gold Mines focuses on near surface and shallow underground ore bodies.
The company holds a 74% stake in TGME and Sabie Mines.
The project meets Black Economic Empowerment standards in South Africa.

sample_flagged.title: Options Prospectus - SPP and Placement Options
ii_key_points: Theta Gold Mines Limited is raising funds via a Share Purchase Plan and Placement Options Offer.
The company aims to raise A$12 million through the Placement and A$2 million through the SPP.
Options offer includes free attaching options with shares, conditional on shareholder approval.
Options under the Cornerstone Investment have exercise prices linked to the 10-day VWAP of ASX shares.
Exercise of options may lead to further dilution of shareholding.
Approval sought for director and employee options and performance rights as part of incentives plan.
Key risks and tax implications of investments are highlighted in the prospectus.

sample_flagged.title: Share Purchase Plan Opens - SPP Offer Document
ii_key_points: Theta Gold Mines Limited offers a Share Purchase Plan (SPP) for shareholders.
Eligible shareholders can purchase shares at $0.21 each, up to $30,000 worth.
The SPP price is at a discount to the last trading price.
Funds to be used for development of the TGME Gold Project in South Africa.
SPP is part of a broader capital raising strategy including placements.
No brokerage or transaction costs for participating shareholders.
The offer is not underwritten.
Closing date for the SPP is 17 November 2025.

rows.title: Notice of Share Purchase Plan & Options Offer Prospectus
ii_key_points: Share Purchase Plan (SPP) and Options Offer announced.
Shares priced at $0.21, matching private placement price.
Eligible shareholders from Australia, New Zealand, UK, Singapore, and Hong Kong.
Free attaching option for every 2.38 shares purchased.
Options exercisable at $0.32, expiring 18 months after grant.
Offers close on 17 November 2025.

rows.title: TGME Gold Plant Build Accelerates - Contractors Mobilised
ii_key_points: Contractors and heavy equipment are fully mobilized on site.
Civil works have commenced at the Carbon-in-Leach section.
Negotiations are advancing with long-lead equipment suppliers.
Workforce has expanded, with over 120 personnel on site.
Recent capital raises have strengthened the company's balance sheet.
Targeting plant commissioning by end of 2026 and production by Q1 2027.

rows.title: Additional US$6m Secured and Conversion of Convertible Loans
ii_key_points: US$6 million secured from Cornerstone Investors led by Hong Kong Ruihua Investment Management Limited.
Shares issued: approximately 59,783,286 fully paid ordinary shares at A$0.155 per share.
Investors are entitled to 1 free attaching option for every 2.38 shares subscribed.
Funds to advance the TGME Gold Mine Project construction and working capital.
Conversion of 2023 convertible loans into 44,029,574 shares.
Strengthening the company's balance sheet and progressing debt syndication.

rows.title: TGM enters into Non-Binding Funding Agreement for US$80M
ii_key_points: Theta Gold Mines Limited secured a non-binding funding agreement for US$80 million.
The funding is from Nebari Partners, LLC in the form of a senior secured loan.
The agreement supports the TGME Gold Mine project in South Africa.
Funding structure includes two tranches: US$45 million at closing and up to US$35 million afterward.
The interest rate is set at 3-month SOFR with a 3.75% floor plus 10% per annum.
Includes a 12-month interest capitalization and an 18-month principal repayment moratorium.
The loan term is 60 months.
Provides funding flexibility for co-lending and debt syndication.
Proceeds will be used for plant construction and achieving the first gold pour by Q1 2027.
